testcase.name: test_price_charizard

failure.message: assert False + where False = <built-in method startswith of str object at 0xf9fedb1c10c0>('charizard') + where <built-in method startswith of str object at 0xf9fedb1c10c0> = "blaine's charizard".startswith + where "blaine's charizard" = <built-in method lower of str object at 0xf9fedb153910>() + where <built-in method lower of str object at 0xf9fedb153910> = "Blaine's Charizard".lower

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_pokevalue_api.py:56: in test_price_charizard assert body["name"].lower().startswith("charizard") E assert False E + where False = <built-in method startswith of str object at 0xf9fedb1c10c0>('charizard') E + where <built-in method startswith of str object at 0xf9fedb1c10c0> = "blaine's charizard".startswith E + where "blaine's charizard" = <built-in method lower of str object at 0xf9fedb153910>() E + where <built-in method lower of str object at 0xf9fedb153910> = "Blaine's Charizard".lower
